# n-dx

> Codebase analysis generated by Sourcevision.
> When using this document: group related items together and separate unrelated concerns.

## Project Overview

- **Files**: 578
- **Lines of code**: 168,299
- **Languages**: TypeScript (470), CSS (27), JSON (26), Other (20), JavaScript (17)
- **Zones**: 9 (9 with descriptions)
- **Git**: feature/from-recommend @ a67e98f
- **Analyzed**: 2026-02-11T15:31:44.890Z

## Architecture Zones

### Claude Client (`claude-client`)

24 files, primarily TypeScript

- Files: 24
- Cohesion: 1.00, Coupling: 0.00
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/claude-client/context.md`

### Hench (`hench`)

100 files, primarily TypeScript

- Files: 100
- Cohesion: 1.00, Coupling: 0.00
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/hench/context.md`

### Rex PRD Management CLI (`packages-rex:rex-cli`)

A self-contained CLI tool and MCP server for managing hierarchical product requirements documents, including code analysis, tree operations, validation, persistence, and AI-agent workflow integration.

- Files: 36
- Cohesion: 1.00, Coupling: 0.00
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/packages-rex:rex-cli/context.md`

### Analysis Engine (`packages-sourcevision:analysis-engine`)

Core analysis pipeline including file inventory, import graph extraction, Louvain community detection, route parsing, AI enrichment, and CLI orchestration.

- Files: 33
- Cohesion: 0.94, Coupling: 0.06
- Entry points: packages/sourcevision/src/analyzers/components.ts, packages/sourcevision/src/analyzers/imports.ts, packages/sourcevision/src/analyzers/inventory.ts, packages/sourcevision/src/analyzers/zones.ts, packages/sourcevision/src/schema/data-files.ts
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/packages-sourcevision:analysis-engine/context.md`

### Interactive Viewer (`packages-sourcevision:interactive-viewer`)

Preact single-page application that visualizes analysis results through force-directed graphs, zone maps, route trees, and findings panels, consuming only schema types with zero analyzer dependencies.

- Files: 46
- Cohesion: 0.96, Coupling: 0.04
- Entry points: packages/sourcevision/src/schema/v1.ts
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/packages-sourcevision:interactive-viewer/context.md`

### Test Fixtures (`packages-sourcevision:test-fixtures`)

Self-contained sample TypeScript project used as input data for integration and end-to-end tests, intentionally isolated with no imports from or exports to production code.

- Files: 7
- Cohesion: 1.00, Coupling: 0.00
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/packages-sourcevision:test-fixtures/context.md`

### Test Suite (`packages-sourcevision:test-suite`)

Unit, integration, and end-to-end tests covering analyzer logic, schema validation, CLI workflows, and the serve command, with imports reaching into both analyzer and viewer zones.

- Files: 5
- Cohesion: 0.46, Coupling: 0.54
- Entry points: packages/sourcevision/src/schema/validate.ts
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/packages-sourcevision:test-suite/context.md`

### Root (`root`)

4 files, primarily JavaScript

- Files: 4
- Cohesion: 1.00, Coupling: 0.00
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/root/context.md`

### Web (`web`)

## Route Structure

### Route Tree

```
/ → packages/sourcevision/tests/fixtures/remix-app/app/routes/_index.tsx
/login → packages/sourcevision/tests/fixtures/remix-app/app/routes/_auth.login.tsx
/users/:id → packages/sourcevision/tests/fixtures/remix-app/app/routes/users.$id.tsx
```

### Convention Exports

- action: 2 modules
- default: 4 modules
- loader: 2 modules
- meta: 1 modules

### Components: 5 total, 0 usage edges

## Findings

### Anti-patterns

- Hotspot cascade effect: tree.ts fan-in (30 files) + walkTree hub function (20 files) + chunked-review coupling (370 calls) create a critical dependency bottleneck affecting 50+ files across rex and dependent packages [critical]
- God function: <module> in packages/sourcevision/tests/unit/analyzers/zones.test.ts calls 82 unique functions — consider decomposing into smaller, focused functions [critical]

### Patterns

- Systematic over-engineering at system boundaries: dead code concentrates in adapters (notion-adapter.ts 19 exports), UI components (renderer.ts 39 exports), and validation layers (validate.ts 8 exports) while core domain logic remains clean [warning]

### Relationships

- Tightly coupled modules: packages/rex/src/cli/commands/chunked-review-state.ts and packages/rex/tests/unit/cli/commands/chunked-review.test.ts — 370 cross-file calls (unidirectional). Consider extracting shared interface or merging [critical]

### Observations

- High cohesion (1) — files are tightly interconnected [info] (claude-client)
- 2 circular dependency chains detected — see imports.json for details [warning]
- Size imbalance: largest zone has 144 files vs smallest with 4 — uneven decomposition [info]
- Fan-in hotspot: packages/rex/src/core/tree.ts receives calls from 31 files — high-impact module, changes may have wide ripple effects [warning]
- High cohesion (1) — files are tightly interconnected [info] (hench)
- High cohesion (1) — files are tightly interconnected [info] (root)
- Contains 45% of project files (144/323) — subdivided into 3 sub-zones [info] (web)
- High cohesion (1) — files are tightly interconnected [info] (web)

### Suggestions

- Implement graduated refactoring strategy: 1) Extract tree.ts operations into focused modules, 2) Break chunked-review test coupling, 3) Decompose analyzeZones god function, 4) Remove dead code from web package adapters [critical]
- Hub function: walkTree in packages/rex/src/core/tree.ts is called from 22 files — changes here have wide impact, consider if responsibilities can be narrowed [warning]
- 39 potentially unused exports in packages/web/src/viewer/graph/renderer.ts have no incoming calls: constructor, highlightNode, centerOnNode, selectNode, clearSelection (+34 more) [warning]
- 19 potentially unused exports in packages/rex/src/store/notion-adapter.ts have no incoming calls: constructor, path, getStatusGroupMap, invalidateCache, loadDocument (+14 more) [warning]
- 9 potentially unused exports in packages/hench/src/store/adjustments.ts have no incoming calls: loadAdaptiveStateAsync, saveAdaptiveStateAsync, recordAdjustment, updateSettings, lockKey (+4 more) [warning]
- 8 potentially unused exports in packages/web/src/schema/validate.ts have no incoming calls: validateManifest, validateInventory, validateImports, validateZones, validateComponents (+3 more) [warning]
- 5 potentially unused exports in packages/rex/src/schema/v1.ts have no incoming calls: isRequirementCategory, isValidationType, isPriority, isItemLevel, isItemStatus [warning]
- 4 potentially unused exports in packages/rex/src/analyze/reason.ts have no incoming calls: reasonFromScanResults, adjustGranularity, assessGranularity, reasonFromBatch [info]
- 4 potentially unused exports in packages/web/src/viewer/components/data-display/health-gauge.ts have no incoming calls: HealthGauge, HealthBadge, PatternBadge, MetricCard [info]
- Break 370-call coupling between packages/rex/src/cli/commands/chunked-review.ts and its test by extracting shared ChunkedReviewState interface to packages/rex/src/core/review-state.ts [critical] (rex)
- ... and 2 more
